data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"4ee7-2207","generatedAt":"2026-04-12T18:34:51Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Frictionless Worktree-to-Session Merge with completes clean merge in single invocation","Refuses merge when worktree gates missing/failed","Aborts on non-.test-index conflicts",".test-index auto-resolves via union driver","Attestation includes worktree ID for audit trail","Pre-commit hooks not modified"]},"stories":[{"id":"1484-23d9","title":"As a sprint orchestrator, I can merge worktree branches without .test-index conflicts","description":".test-index merge=union in .gitattributes","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Merging two branches with .test-index additions produces merged file without conflicts"],"considerations":["Union driver produces duplicate lines for identical entries \u2014 cosmetic only"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC4: .test-index auto-resolves via union driver"},{"id":"4770-bda6","title":"As a sprint writes review-status with current hash, skips overlap check","--attest refuses when source missing/failed/stale","Attested files include attest_source field"],"considerations":["Overlap check pre-commit hooks first try","Exits 2 when worktree gates missing/failed","Exits 1 and aborts on non-.test-index conflicts","MERGE_HEAD cleanup via trap on failure","Documents MERGE_HEAD state at
